// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Handler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Handler<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Handler<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.EventProcessor>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var f_p0 = sp.GetServices<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.Event>>();
                return (global::TestNamespace.EventProcessor)global::TestNamespace.EventProcessorFactory.Create(sp, f_p0);
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IEventProcessor>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var f_p0 = sp.GetServices<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.Event>>();
                return global::TestNamespace.EventProcessorFactory.Create(sp, f_p0);
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Event>, global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Event>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.Event>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Handler<global::TestNamespace.Event>>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
